name: Utkarsh Tyagi
tagline: Curious about the AI and data space — building agentic systems and RAG pipelines that turn unstructured information into decisions people can act on.
about: I'm someone deeply interested in the AI and data space — exploring how large language models, retrieval, and applied ML come together in real systems. My focus is on agentic workflows: multi-step pipelines where models make decisions, call tools, and pause for a human when their confidence drops. Currently building RAG-based investment intelligence at Mandala Capital, with prior experience deploying ML and analytics systems for Fortune 500 clients at Deloitte. Master's in Business Analytics from NUS, with a Computer Science background.
